description: Default fullstack profile — filesystem, GitHub, Postgres, Redis, Puppeteer, Fetch, Memory

filesystem.description: Read, write, and manage project files and directories

github.description: Manage repositories, issues, PRs, branches, and releases on GitHub

postgres.description: Query PostgreSQL databases, inspect schemas, and run SQL statements

redis.description: Interact with Redis for cache inspection, key management, and pub/sub

puppeteer.description: Browser automation for testing UI, taking screenshots, and verifying rendered output

fetch.description: Fetch web pages and API documentation, convert HTML to markdown for analysis

memory.description: Persistent knowledge graph for tracking project decisions, entities, and architecture
